beTheFinalBossCodes.title: Be The Final Boss Codes
beTheFinalBossCodes.intro: Be The Final Boss currently has one working release code. Enter it through the Codes section at the bottom of the Settings menu to claim free Coins, then put the reward toward permanent Skill Tree upgrades or your main weapon.

redemption_steps: Launch Be The Final Boss on Roblox and wait for your castle to load.
Select the Settings icon in the top-left corner.
Scroll to the Codes section at the bottom of the menu.
Enter betheboss exactly as shown and press Redeem.
items.best_use: Put the Coins toward permanent Skill Tree upgrades or your main weapon before attempting harder hero waves.

tips: Codes are case-sensitive, so enter betheboss exactly as written.
If a code says it is invalid, double-check the spelling before assuming it has expired.
New codes are usually released around updates, milestones, and events.

beTheFinalBossBeginnerGuide.title: Be The Final Boss Beginner Guide
beTheFinalBossBeginnerGuide.intro: The core loop of Be The Final Boss is simple: summon minions, stop heroes from reaching the castle, collect resources, and improve both your boss and your army. Follow this route to avoid spreading early resources too thin.

steps.title: Claim the Release Code
steps.description: Redeem betheboss in Settings for 500 Coins before buying your first major upgrades.

steps.title: Summon a Basic Defense
steps.description: Use Souls to add minions so the incoming heroes are not focused entirely on your character or castle.

steps.title: Fight Beside Your Minions
steps.description: Meet heroes before they reach the castle and help finish enemies that break through your defensive line.

steps.title: Prioritize Permanent Power
steps.description: Spend Coins on useful Skill Tree boosts and keep one main weapon upgraded instead of dividing resources across every option.

steps.title: Scale for Later Waves
steps.description: Repeat waves, replace weak early summons with stronger unlocked minions, and move to newer weapons when they outperform your current upgrade level.

quickTips: Keep at least one frontline minion active so heroes do not run straight at your castle.
Reinvest Coins into the Skill Tree instead of hoarding them between waves.
Upgrade one dependable weapon rather than splitting Coins across several low-level options.
Watch which heroes break through, then adjust your minion mix for the next wave.

beTheFinalBossMinionTierList.title: Be The Final Boss Minion Tier List
beTheFinalBossMinionTierList.intro: A balanced army is more effective than filling every slot with the cheapest summon. Use durable minions to slow heroes, keep damage-focused summons protected, and gradually replace early units as stronger options unlock in Be The Final Boss.

tiers.label: Core Late-Wave Picks
tiers.strengths: Best overall combination of damage, durability, and usefulness against stronger hero waves.
tiers.investment: Highest Soul priority; build the army around these units once unlocked.

tiers.label: Frontline Defenders
minions: Units that keep heroes away from the castle
tiers.strengths: Create time for your boss and backline minions to deal damage safely.
tiers.investment: Keep enough frontline units active to prevent fast breakthroughs.

tiers.label: Protected Damage Dealers
tiers.strengths: Deliver useful sustained damage while another minion holds enemy attention.
tiers.investment: Add after the frontline is stable; avoid leaving them exposed.

tiers.label: Temporary Early Summons
tiers.strengths: Affordable help during the first waves but weaker as hero health and pressure increase.
tiers.investment: Use early, then replace rather than continuing to spend heavily on them.

beTheFinalBossBestWeapons.title: Be The Final Boss Best Weapons
beTheFinalBossBestWeapons.intro: Weapons unlock as progression advances in Be The Final Boss, and Coins also fund weapon and Skill Tree improvements. The strongest route is to maintain one upgraded main weapon and avoid draining Coins into several low-level options at once.

weapons.weapon_choice: Highest unlocked and properly upgraded weapon
weapons.strength: Combines later-game scaling with enough upgrades to handle groups of heroes efficiently.
A heavily upgraded older weapon can remain stronger than a fresh unlock with no investment.

weapons.weapon_choice: Newly unlocked weapon with few upgrades
weapons.strength: May become the best option after investment, but should be tested before replacing a proven main weapon.
Simple and immediately available, but its value falls once stronger weapons and permanent upgrades are unlocked.

beTheFinalBossSkillTree.title: Be The Final Boss Skill Tree Builds
beTheFinalBossSkillTree.intro: Coins spent in the Skill Tree provide permanent progression between hero waves. Build around the part of your defense that is currently failing, then spread later upgrades across player power, minion strength and castle durability.

builds.name: Balanced Starter Build

steps.guidance: Start with player-focused upgrades so you can fight beside your minions and clear early heroes consistently.
Improve minion power after your character can comfortably support the front line.
Add castle-focused upgrades before entering waves where escaped heroes can quickly end a run.

builds.result: Steady damage, dependable minions and enough protection to recover from small defensive mistakes.

builds.name: Minion Army Build
builds.best_for: Players who want summons to handle most enemies

steps.guidance: Direct the largest share of early Skill Tree spending toward permanent minion improvements.
Strengthen the castle so it can survive when enemies break through the minion line.
Add player power to eliminate stronger heroes and support weak points in the formation.

builds.result: A summon-centered build that uses the player as support and emergency damage.

builds.name: High-Wave Survival Build
builds.best_for: Long runs against increasingly difficult hero waves

steps.guidance: Invest in castle-focused upgrades before pushing beyond your current highest wave.
Raise minion strength to reduce the number of heroes reaching the final defensive area.
Improve personal combat power to finish durable enemies and intercept heroes that escape.

builds.result: A defensive build designed to prevent one breakthrough from ending an otherwise successful run.

beTheFinalBossCoinsAndSouls.title: Be The Final Boss Coins And Souls Guide
beTheFinalBossCoinsAndSouls.intro: Be The Final Boss separates character progression from minion recruitment through two currencies. Use Coins to improve permanent combat power and save Souls for obtaining stronger minions that can hold the defensive line.

currencies.name: Coins
sources: The release code betheboss, which rewards 500 Coins
currencies.spending_priority: Buy useful early Skill Tree upgrades first, then improve weapons when your personal damage falls behind the current hero waves.

currencies.name: Souls
sources: Special rewards announced by the developers
currencies.spending_priority: Save Souls for minion improvements instead of repeatedly spending them without strengthening your active defensive lineup.

spending_order.details: Claim the 500-Coin release reward through the code field in Settings.
Use Coins on early Skill Tree upgrades that improve your ability to clear hero waves.
Use Souls to obtain better minions before saving for additional summon upgrades.
Alternate later spending between weapons, minions and castle-focused upgrades according to the part of the defense that fails first.

beTheFinalBossCastleDefense.title: Be The Final Boss Castle Defense Guide
beTheFinalBossCastleDefense.intro: Heroes attack in endless waves and become harder to stop as a run continues. Your minions form the main defensive line, but the player must actively support them, intercept escaped enemies and spend resources before the next major difficulty increase.

strategies.name: Establish the Front Line
strategies.strategy: Summon minions before the incoming heroes reach the castle and keep the army positioned between the attackers and the final defensive area.
strategies.avoid: Waiting until heroes are already close to the castle before building the defensive line.

strategies.name: Fight Beside Your Minions
strategies.strategy: Use your weapon to damage heroes while they are occupied by minions. Move toward any enemy that escapes instead of remaining in one position.
strategies.avoid: Expecting minions to clear every wave without direct player support.

strategies.name: Protect Against Breakthroughs
strategies.strategy: Watch the route behind your main army and immediately intercept heroes that pass the frontline. Castle-focused Skill Tree upgrades provide additional protection during longer runs.
strategies.avoid: Following one target too far away while another hero advances toward the castle.

strategies.name: Upgrade Before Damage Falls Behind
strategies.strategy: Spend Coins on weapons and permanent Skill Tree upgrades when enemies take too long to defeat. Use Souls to improve the minion army when the frontline collapses too quickly.
strategies.avoid: Saving every resource while the current defense is already unable to control a wave.

strategies.name: Prepare for Endless Scaling
strategies.strategy: Balance player power, minion strength and castle defense instead of relying entirely on one system. Later waves punish weak points more heavily than early waves.
strategies.avoid: Investing everything into personal damage while leaving minions and the castle unprotected.

strategies.name: Recover the Defensive Line
strategies.strategy: When several heroes break through, retreat toward the castle, clear the closest threats first and allow surviving minions to regroup around the remaining enemies.
strategies.avoid: Continuing to attack distant heroes while immediate threats are damaging the final defense.

beTheFinalBossUpdates.title: Be The Final Boss Updates
beTheFinalBossUpdates.intro: The release version centers on defending a castle from endless hero waves, summoning minions, unlocking weapons and purchasing permanent Skill Tree upgrades. Check the official channels after major game updates for new rewards and balance changes.

entries.title: Core Castle Defense Gameplay
changes: Defend the castle against endless waves of invading heroes.
Summon minions that fight alongside the player.
Level up a permanent Skill Tree.
Unlock new weapons as progression continues.

entries.title: betheboss Code Added
changes: The release code betheboss is listed on the official Roblox game page.
Codes are redeemed through the code field inside the Settings menu.

entries.title: Official Game Page Tracking
changes: The Roblox description displays the current release code and main gameplay features.
The in-game codes board is used for additional reward information.
The game supports desktop, mobile and console.

entries.title: Developer Announcement Channels
changes: Apparently Champions is the official Roblox community behind the game.
Apparently Games publishes developer information through its official X account.
Future code, weapon, minion and balance announcements should be checked against these official channels.

faq.title: Be The Final Boss
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Be The Final Boss

questions.question: What are Be The Final Boss codes?
questions.answer: Be The Final Boss codes are free redeem codes that grant Coins and other rewards. The current working code is betheboss, worth 500 Coins, entered in the Codes section of the Settings menu.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in Be The Final Boss?
questions.answer: In Be The Final Boss, open the Settings icon in the top-left corner, scroll to the Codes section at the bottom of the menu, type the code, and press Redeem to claim your reward.

questions.question: What platforms is Be The Final Boss on?
questions.answer: Be The Final Boss is a Roblox game that supports Desktop, Mobile, and Console, so you can play it on PC, phones, tablets, and consoles through the Roblox app.

questions.question: What do minions do in Be The Final Boss?
questions.answer: In Be The Final Boss, minions are the summoned units that defend your castle alongside your boss. You spend Souls to summon them, and a balanced army slows heroes so your castle survives longer.

questions.question: What is the Skill Tree in Be The Final Boss?
questions.answer: The Skill Tree in Be The Final Boss holds permanent upgrades for your boss, minions, and castle defense. Coins unlock these nodes, and a focused path makes later waves much easier.

questions.question: How do I get more Coins and Souls in Be The Final Boss?
questions.answer: In Be The Final Boss, you earn Coins and Souls by surviving hero waves, redeeming codes like betheboss, and progressing through the game. Spend Coins on permanent upgrades and Souls on summoning stronger minions.

codes.whatIs: What are Be The Final Boss Codes?
codes.whatIsDescription: Be The Final Boss codes are promotional redeem codes released by the developer Apparently Champions that grant free in-game rewards such as Coins. Codes are tied to updates, milestones, and events, so new codes appear as the game grows.
codes.why: Why use Be The Final Boss codes?

whySteps.step1Description: Redeeming the active code betheboss grants 500 Coins right away, giving your castle defenses an early boost without grinding.
whySteps.step2Description: New codes drop alongside content updates, so checking back regularly ensures you never miss free rewards.
whySteps.step3Description: Every code is checked before listing, with expired codes clearly marked so you only redeem what actually works.

guide.whatIsDescription: The Be The Final Boss guide covers everything you need to start strong: core controls, the summon-defend-upgrade loop, early game routing, long-term progression, and trial completion. It is built for new players learning the reverse tower defense boss simulator.

minions.whatIs: What are Be The Final Boss minions?
minions.whatIsDescription: Minions are the summonable units you deploy to defend your castle against endless hero waves in Be The Final Boss. Each minion has unique abilities, rarity, upgrade costs, and a role in your team composition, making the right lineup essential for survival.

weapons.whatIs: What are Be The Final Boss weapons?
weapons.whatIsDescription: Weapons are the player-controlled tools you wield alongside your minions to fight off hero waves in Be The Final Boss. Each weapon has distinct damage, attack speed, range, upgrade costs, and unlock conditions, so choosing and upgrading the right one directly impacts your survivability.
weapons.why: Why focus on Be The Final Boss weapons?

whySteps.step1Description: Tier lists and damage comparisons help you choose weapons that match your playstyle and wave-clear needs.
whySteps.step2Description: Upgrade guides and cost breakdowns show which investments deliver the biggest power spike for your resources.
whySteps.step3Description: Best early weapon recommendations get you through the opening waves without wasting Coins on weak options.

skills.whatIs: What is the Be The Final Boss skill tree?
skills.whatIsDescription: The skill tree is the long-term progression system in Be The Final Boss where you spend skill points to unlock permanent upgrades for your boss, castle, and player abilities. Choosing the right nodes and order shapes how quickly you scale into later waves.
skills.why: Why plan your Be The Final Boss skill tree?

whySteps.step1Description: Skill point farming and best early upgrade guides ensure you always have points ready and invest them where they matter most.
whySteps.step2Description: Castle upgrade paths show how to reinforce defenses so your base survives longer against stronger hero waves.
whySteps.step3Description: Player upgrade routes improve your personal combat impact, letting you carry fights your minions alone would lose.

waves.whatIs: What are Be The Final Boss waves?
waves.whatIsDescription: Waves are the endless stages of heroes that assault your castle in Be The Final Boss. Each wave grows harder, introducing stronger enemies, boss encounters, and mounting pressure. Learning wave patterns, enemy types, and defense strategies is the key to pushing your highest wave.
waves.why: Why learn Be The Final Boss wave strategy?

whySteps.step1Description: Survival strategy and wave-by-wave guides help you anticipate danger and adapt your minion lineup as pressure increases.
whySteps.step2Description: Boss wave breakdowns reveal how to handle high-threat enemies before they break your defenses.
whySteps.step3Description: Castle defense and endurance tactics give you the framework to break your personal best and climb the leaderboards.

currencies.whatIs: What are Be The Final Boss currencies?
currencies.whatIsDescription: Currencies in Be The Final Boss are the resources you earn and spend to grow stronger, primarily Coins and Souls. Coins fund minions, weapons, and castle upgrades, while Souls unlock advanced upgrades. Knowing how to farm and prioritize spending is essential for steady progression.
currencies.why: Why manage Be The Final Boss currencies?

whySteps.step1Description: Coins and Souls farming guides reveal the most efficient routes to stock up without wasting time.
whySteps.step2Description: Spending priority guides show which upgrades deliver the most value early so you never waste resources.
whySteps.step3Description: Currency reward breakdowns help you claim every source of income, from codes to wave milestones.
